title: Welcome to Toril & Chult
readAloud:
Welcome...
to Toril.
A world of ancient kingdoms, powerful magic, legendary heroes...
and dangers beyond imagination.
Across Toril, countless stories have been told.
Great wars have shaped nations.
Gods have walked among mortals.
Ancient civilisations have risen...
and fallen into ruin.


This is a world where a farmer can become a hero.
Where a forgotten name can become a legend.
And where a single group of adventurers...
can change the fate of everything.

Many stories begin on the Sword Coast in places like Neverwinter, BaldersGate or Waterdeep.
A land of great cities, famous heroes and dangerous frontiers.
But our story begins somewhere very different.

Far to the south...
across dangerous oceans...
lies a land unlike anywhere else.

Chult.
A land where nature rules.
Endless jungles stretch further than the eye can see.
Ancient trees hide forgotten temples.
Lost cities sleep beneath vines and stone.

Dinosaurs still walk the earth.
Strange creatures hunt beneath the canopy.
Treasure hunters, explorers and adventurers travel here searching for fame and fortune...

Many never return.

But Chult is more than danger.
It is a land of proud people.
Ancient traditions.
Great merchant princes.
Colourful markets.
And mysteries older than anyone remembers.

Somewhere in those jungles...
are stories waiting to be discovered.
Secrets waiting to be uncovered.
And legends waiting to be made.

Welcome to Chult.
Welcome...
to the beginning of your adventure.
